wizard.title: New patient
wizard.description: Patient details → choose a published pathway → confirm.
wizard.name: Name
wizard.phoneHint: Required. Area code + number (10 or 11 digits).
wizard.pathwayPlaceholder: Select a pathway with a published version
wizard.pathwayHelp: Only pathways with at least one published version and stages are listed.
wizard.pathwayEmpty: No pathways available. Publish a version under Pathways before enrolling patients.
wizard.errorGeneric: Could not complete. Please try again.

list.title: Patients
list.pathwaysLoadError: Failed to load pathways for filters.
list.stagesLoadError: Failed to load stages for the selected pathway.

pagination.statusCappedHint: Status filter: results are capped to the first patients by last update; the total may be incomplete.

deleteDialog.title: Delete patient
deleteDialog.alertTitle: This action cannot be undone in the app
deleteDialog.description: The patient will disappear from the list and dashboard (pathways, files, and history hidden from the team). Records stay in the database for compliance; we store who performed the deletion and when.
deleteDialog.genericError: Could not delete. Please try again.

selfRegister.dialogDescription: The patient scans the QR code or opens the link to fill in their details. Each link expires in 48 hours and can only be used once.
selfRegister.dialogDescriptionForPatient: This link and QR update this patient’s record when used (same expiry and single-use rules). Copy, share, or send via WhatsApp.
selfRegister.shareMessagePlain: Use this link to complete or update your registration: {url}
selfRegister.loadError: Could not generate the link. Please try again.
selfRegister.pageDescription: Fill in your details. The clinic will choose the treatment pathway next.
selfRegister.scopedFormHint: This link is only for your record at this clinic. Review and update your details if needed.
selfRegister.invalidTokenBody: Ask the front desk or your provider for a new QR code or link.
selfRegister.successBody: Your details were sent. The clinic team has been notified and will follow up.

portalLink.emailRequired: Add an email on the patient record to send the link automatically.
portalLink.emailSent: Portal link emailed to the patient.
portalLink.linkCopied: Link copied. Send it to the patient through a secure channel.
portalLink.copyManually: Copy the link below and send it to the patient:
portalLink.error: Could not generate the portal link.

caseNotes.title: Case description
caseNotes.description: Clinical summary or care context. Changes are saved on the patient record.
caseNotes.label: Notes

notes.title: Clinical notes
notes.description: Dedicated patient note history with author and timestamp.
notes.label: New note
notes.placeholder: Write a clinical or operational note

files.title: Uploaded files
files.description: Files linked to this patient. Open creates a short-lived secure link to view or download.
files.empty: No files linked to this patient.
files.deleteConfirmDescription: This cannot be undone. “{fileName}” will be permanently removed.
files.rejectDialogDescription: The patient will no longer see this file in the portal. «{fileName}»

noPathway.title: No active pathway
noPathway.description: This patient is not enrolled in a published pathway yet.
noPathway.descriptionWithHistory: There is no pathway in progress. Completed treatments are listed in the section below.

completedTreatments.title: Completed treatments
completedTreatments.description: Closed pathways, separate from the active one. Expand each entry for stages, checklist, and transition history.
completedTreatments.assigneeHint: Current value on the patient; it may have changed after this treatment.
completedTreatments.documentsEmpty: No documents linked to stages in this version.
completedTreatments.checklistEmpty: No checklist items in this pathway version.
completedTreatments.noTransitions: No transitions recorded for this pathway.
completedTreatments.transitionsTruncated: Showing the first 400 transitions only. Contact support if you need the full audit trail.

journey.title: Pathway
journey.completedBanner: Treatment completed on {date}. Stage and transition history remain available.
journey.readOnlyHint: This pathway is closed: stage moves and checklist edits are disabled.

assigneeOverview.title: Ownership in the pathway
assigneeOverview.description: How the patient reached the current stage, who owns it now, and upcoming stages in published order.
assigneeOverview.noAssignee: None set — alerts follow the tenant default rule.
assigneeOverview.noFollowing: No later stages in this order.
assigneeOverview.linearHint: Branching flows may not follow this linear list.

nextActions.title: Next actions
nextActions.description: Operational snapshot of the current stage: SLA, stage message, and required checklist gaps before moving on.
nextActions.pendingRequiredTitle: Required checklist still open (blocks stage change)
nextActions.noBlockingChecklist: No required checklist items blocking transition.

checklist.title: Current stage checklist
checklist.description: Track the operational items for stage {stage}.
checklist.descriptionEmpty: The current stage for this patient does not have a configured checklist yet.
checklist.empty: No checklist items for this stage.

transition.title: Change stage
transition.description: Pick the target stage. The same transition API rules apply.
transition.blockedByChecklist: Required checklist items are still open. Enter a justification below to record a forced transition (audited).
transition.overrideReasonPlaceholder: Explain why the stage advances without completing required items…
transition.overrideReasonHint: At least 10 characters. Stored in the transition history.
transition.overrideReasonMin: Enter a justification of at least 10 characters to force the transition.
transition.confirmDescription: Check source, target, and note. Channel dispatch (e.g. WhatsApp) follows the transition API.
transition.stageDocumentsEmpty: No documents linked to this stage. Ask a tenant admin to attach library files to the stage.

profile.title: Contact & ownership
profile.description: Email, CPF, internal owner, and OPME supplier when applicable.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Transitions, files linked to the patient, and self-registration events.
timeline.cappedHint: Only the most recent events are merged here; totals may be incomplete.
timeline.forcedNoReason: Forced transition (no reason on this event)
